summary: #58004 is closed and obsolete as a live canonical. #19929 is the clearest open canonical for the remaining non-direct shared-session gap; the direct-DM continuity subfamily is already closed as implemented on main, no open mergeable PR exists, and #20078 is closed prior art only, so this run emits no close/merge actions and instead prepares a credited replacement fix artifact.
